extras.content: The more I read and discussed these practices, the more I realized this would help not only our budget but also our health. 译文:对这些了解、探讨得越多，我就越意识到这不但能够解决家庭开支，还有益健康。
abandon oneself to 沉溺于 They abandon themselves to drinking. 他们沉湎于饮酒。

senses.example: To some degree bonus is an effective way to motivate the workers.
senses.example_zh: 从某种程度上来说，奖金是调动工作积极性的一种有效方法。

senses.example: The win on the pools was a real bonus.
senses.example_zh: 赌博赢钱真是意外收获。

senses.example: Reading more can help to enlarge one's vocabulary. // The balloon enlarged as we pumped air into it.
senses.example_zh: 多阅读有助于扩大词汇量。// 随着我们往里充气，气球渐渐变大。

senses.example: I planned to enlarge this photograph.

derivatives: enlargement n. 扩大,扩建部分

senses.example: A shrewd housewife should be good at planning the family budget.
senses.example_zh: 精明的主妇应擅长计划家庭预算。

senses.def_en: to make plans for the careful use of (money, time, etc.)
senses.example: We couldn't budget for every emergency. // She's learned how to budget her time carefully.
senses.example_zh: 我们不可能为每个紧急事件做好安排。// 她已经学会了怎样精心安排自己的时间。

senses.example: Most movie stars are not willing to disclose their true age.
senses.example_zh: 大多数电影明星不愿透露其真实年龄。

senses.def_en: to show sth. that is usually covered or hidden
senses.example: Keep indoors and don't expose your skin to the sun.
senses.example_zh: 待在室内，不要把皮肤暴露在阳光下。

senses.def_en: to make it possible for sb. to experience new ideas, ways of life etc. (~to)
senses.example: His books exposed people to new ideas.
senses.example_zh: 他的书使人们接触了新思潮。

senses.def_en: to reveal the crimes or faults
senses.example: The reporter was killed because he tried to expose a plot.
senses.example_zh: 这名记者因为试图揭露一个阴谋而被杀害。

derivatives: exposure n. 暴露;揭发;曝光

senses.def_en: to find out about sth. that has been kept secret
senses.example: Customs officials uncovered a plot to smuggle weapons into the country.
senses.example_zh: 海关官员发现了一个往国内走私武器的阴谋。

senses.example: Uncover the bottle when you heat the milk in the microwave oven.
senses.example_zh: 用微波炉加热牛奶时要把瓶盖打开。

senses.def_en: to leave sb., esp. sb. you are responsible for
senses.example: The heartless man abandoned his disabled wife.
senses.example_zh: 那个没良心的男人抛弃了残疾的妻子。

senses.def_en: to stop doing sth. because there are too many problems and it is impossible to continue
senses.example: They abandoned the attempt to search for the child when the night came.
senses.example_zh: 天色已晚，他们放弃了寻找孩子的企图。

senses.def_en: to stop doing (an action or activity)
senses.example: It's not easy to quit smoking and drinking.

senses.def_en: to leave (a job, school, career, etc.)
senses.example: He quit his job due to his health problem. // I'm tired of being treated like this. I quit.
senses.example_zh: 由于健康问题，他辞去了工作。// 我厌倦了别人这样对待我，我不干了。

senses.def_en: to give up (a job or position) in a formal or official way
